rule: Routines gather and write convention files; the engine remains pure.

routines.title: Fundstrat Intake
input_boundaries: Gmail connector full-body reads
Compact full-body-derived Fundstrat daily call rows when connector bodies cannot be safely piped to a file
Authenticated Fundstrat website pages read through the user's logged-in Chrome session and converted into compact rows without raw bodies or credentials
Operator-supplied Fundstrat website screenshot/text converted into compact action-relevant rows
Video-only Fundstrat items only when transcript, captions, companion article text, or supplied compact notes are available
Fundstrat daily email drop-folder text, eml, or Gmail-shaped json
Direct monthly Fundstrat PDF/text/json uploads

commands.command: python src/fundstrat_email_intake.py --stdin-json --out-dir src --state src/fundstrat_intake_state.json --merge-existing --top-prospects src/top_prospects.json --source-calls src/source_calls.json --log-call-dates src/log_call_dates.json --source-call-summary src/source_call_cache_summary.json

python src/fundstrat_email_intake.py <files> --out-dir src --state src/fundstrat_intake_state.json --merge-existing --top-prospects src/top_prospects.json --source-calls src/source_calls.json --log-call-dates src/log_call_dates.json --source-call-summary src/source_call_cache_summary.json

commands.fallback_for: authenticated Fundstrat website or article-detail pages converted into compact full-body-derived rows
daytime Pushover alerting after compact full-body-derived rows are merged and validated
missed-trigger guard after daytime Fundstrat evidence is merged and validated

routines.verification: python -m pytest src/test_fundstrat_email_intake.py src/test_fundstrat_daily_compact_intake.py src/test_fundstrat_web_intake.py src/test_fundstrat_daytime_alert.py src/test_pushover_notify.py src/test_fundstrat_bible_intake.py src/test_fundstrat_daily.py src/test_source_call_cache_merge.py src/test_source_call_candidate_draft.py -q
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not overwrite Fundstrat caches; report Fundstrat as not checked. Low-value Fundstrat fluff can remain audit/discovery context, but must not become a daily-call row, action prompt, or push alert.

routines.title: Fundstrat Deep Crawl
input_boundaries: Authenticated Fundstrat website pages read through the user's logged-in Chrome session
Machine-readable target manifest at src/fundstrat_deep_crawl_targets.json
Stock-list and sector-allocation tables reduced to compact baseline/diff metadata only
Existing Fundstrat compact intake helpers for action-changing detail-page rows
No raw member-page text, screenshots, credentials, cookies, local storage, browser profile data, or raw transcripts

commands.fallback_for: when the crawl lands compact Fundstrat rows through the existing intake helpers

routines.verification: python src/fundstrat_deep_crawl.py --validate && python -m pytest src/test_fundstrat_deep_crawl.py src/test_fundstrat_web_intake.py -q
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not overwrite Fundstrat list baselines; report the deep crawl as not checked and name the Chrome/login/CAPTCHA/permission/table blocker.

routines.title: Catalyst Intake
input_boundaries: Notion Catalyst Calendar connector rows when available
Catalyst Calendar export json or csv
Catalyst drop-folder files
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not overwrite catalysts.json; report catalysts as not checked.

routines.title: Broker Position Intake
input_boundaries: SnapTrade read-only account API via local non-secret profile config and environment secrets
Selectable-text broker PDFs
Broker text exports
Externally generated combined.json

commands.preferred_for: daily market-day account refresh and whenever the operator reports trades

commands.fallback_for: safe validation when the operator wants to inspect staged account data before promotion

commands.command: python src/position_reconciliation.py --combined combined.json --theses src/theses.json --prior-account-positions src/account_positions.json --account-out src/account_positions.json --reconcile-out src/position_reconciliation.json

routines.verification: python -m pytest src/test_broker_pdf_extractor.py src/test_build_positions_cache.py src/test_build_positions_golden.py src/test_position_reconciliation.py src/test_positions_freshness.py -q
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not overwrite position caches; report position extraction as not checked.

routines.title: UW Cache Refresh
input_boundaries: Unusual Whales connector/API results gathered by bounded workers
Supplied UW close-price response JSON for rotation cache
Supplied yield-curve and cross-asset macro JSON for macro state

commands.command: cd src && python -m codex_uw.orchestrator --mode opportunity --entries-dir ../tmp/uw/opportunity_entries --emit-bundle ../tmp/uw/opportunity_bundle.json --emit-cache uw_opportunity_signals.json --max-workers 5 --retry-failed 1

cd src && python -m codex_uw.orchestrator --mode parabolic --entries-dir ../tmp/uw/parabolic_entries --emit-bundle ../tmp/uw/parabolic_bundle.json --emit-cache parabolic_setups.json --max-workers 5 --retry-failed 1

routines.verification: python src/uw_opportunity_scan.py --self-test && python src/parabolic_setup_screener.py --self-test && python src/macro_pulse_scan.py --self-test && python -m pytest src/test_live_source_config_update.py src/test_uw_price_cache_intake.py src/test_macro_freshness.py src/test_uw_macro.py src/test_uw_macro_adapter.py src/test_uw_opportunity_scan.py src/test_insider_cache_refresh.py src/test_full_build_runner.py -q
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not mark UW lanes checked clear; report missing UW input as not checked and skipped or failed tickers explicitly.

routines.title: Options Chain Refresh
input_boundaries: Unusual Whales get_stock_screener + get_options_chain responses, one per bounded conviction-universe name, at the standard monthly opex
theses.json for the conviction-universe selection (ACTIVE names; no-add sleeves excluded)

commands.command: cd src && python -c "import json,options_chain_refresh as o; t=json.load(open('theses.json')); print(' '.join(o.select_universe(t, cap=16))); print(o.target_expiry('<as_of>', dte=45))"

routines.verification: python src/options_chain_refresh.py --self-test && python -m pytest src/test_options_chain_refresh.py src/test_full_build_runner.py src/test_options_surface.py -q
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not mark the options lane checked clear; a missing or partial chain bundle leaves feed.options_expression omitted (additive) and is reported as not checked, never as 'no options expression'.

routines.title: Daily Synthesis Intake
input_boundaries: Notion Synthesis Log read/write when connector access is available
Supplied Daily Synthesis JSON
Repo-evidence synthesis generated only from an existing cockpit feed
No autonomous market narrative generation
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not overwrite daily_synthesis.json; report Daily Synthesis as not checked.

routines.title: Signal Log Intake
input_boundaries: Notion Signal Log search/fetch rows when connector access is available
Supplied Signal Log JSON
Supplied Morning Scan JSON
Watch-only context; no action promotion
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not overwrite signal_log.json; report Signal Log as not checked.

routines.title: Event Risk Intake
input_boundaries: Supplied daily or weekly event-risk JSON
Supplied news-summary rows from user, Claude build, or an explicit market-event scan
No autonomous headline scraping or invented market narrative

commands.command: python src/event_risk_intake.py --title "<event headline>" --channels "oil,rates,volatility" --tickers "XOP,TNX" --why "<why exposure or timing changes>" --trigger "<what to watch next>" --out src/event_risks.json --summary src/event_risk_intake_summary.json --merge-existing
python src/sudden_event_refresh.py --title "<event headline>" --channels "oil,rates,volatility" --tickers "XOP,TNX" --why "<why exposure or timing changes>" --trigger "<what to watch next>"

routines.verification: python -m pytest src/test_event_risk.py src/test_sudden_event_refresh.py src/test_full_build_runner.py src/test_cockpit_blocks.py -q
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not overwrite event_risks.json; report Event Risk as not checked.

routines.title: Federal Funding Moves
input_boundaries: Official federal award, loan, grant, contract, and program-funding pages
Secondary market/news sources only for ticker mapping, price reaction, and read-through context
Compact structured rows only; no raw article bodies or invented award data

commands.command: python src/federal_funding_intake.py --stdin-json --out src/federal_funding_moves.json --summary src/federal_funding_intake_summary.json --signal-log-out src/signal_log.json --research-out src/research_queue.json --theses src/theses.json --merge-existing

routines.no_input_behavior: If no official federal sources can be checked, do not overwrite federal_funding_moves.json and report Federal Funding Moves as not checked. If sources are checked and no useful rows exist, write an empty checked scan without touching derived Signal Log or Research Queue rows.

routines.title: Daily Full Build
input_boundaries: Repo convention files only
Manual source-drop JSON when explicitly supplied
No live source acquisition

convention_inputs.missing_behavior: Required position cache; build failure if missing or empty.
Account views are not checked; do not imply no account-level breakdown.
Required thesis map; build failure if missing.
Price-derived lanes are not checked; quiet tape must not read as all clear.
Macro lane is not checked; stale or missing macro must remain visible.
Monthly Fundstrat state is not checked; do not overwrite with empty state.
Daily Fundstrat calls are not checked; snippet discovery is not a clear lane.
Archived Meridian thesis context is not checked when absent; do not treat it as fresh tactical evidence or a live-source gap.
Routine health is not checked; keep heartbeat absence visible.
Signal Log is not checked; missing fetch is not no signals.

convention_inputs.source: reddit/social API or supplied normalized social cache
convention_inputs.missing_behavior: Social Watch is not checked; missing Reddit/social fetch is not no social anomalies.
Event Risk is not checked; missing headlines are not no event risk.
Daily Synthesis is not checked; vague or absent synthesis must not create trades.
Research Queue is not checked; do not overwrite or assume no research.
Catalysts are not checked; absence is not no near-term catalysts.
UW opportunity flow is not checked; missing cache is not quiet tape.
Action aging memory is not checked; missing store is not resolved actions.
Prospects are not checked; missing file is not no prospects.
Watch/interest list is not checked; missing file is not no operator interest names.
Source-call cache is not checked; calibration remains provisional.
Inbox date calibration is not checked; do not treat persistence as fully calibrated.
Log date calibration is not checked; do not treat persistence as fully calibrated.
Daily pullback/action/watchlist packet is not checked; missing packet is not no pullback or reallocation candidates.
Parabolic risk cache is not checked; missing file is not no chase risk.
Options-expression chain cache is not checked; a missing bundle is not no options expression of convictions.

commands.fallback_for: refresh dossier price/timing reads from already-present UW price/opportunity evidence before Today/Decide cards are assembled
refresh rail-free pullback/watchlist packet before the final Today/Decide build
post-close missed-trigger guard before the dashboard render consumes trigger_check_summary.json

routines.verification: python -m pytest src/test_full_build_runner.py src/test_live_readiness.py src/test_heartbeat_status.py src/test_runtime_full.py src/test_cockpit_blocks.py src/test_live_dashboard_refresh.py -q
routines.no_input_behavior: Missing optional source files remain dark lanes; publish gate prevents unsafe feed overwrite.

routines.title: Off-Hours Research Queue
input_boundaries: Research Queue json or csv export
Explicit queue rows only
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not overwrite research_queue.json; report Research Queue as not checked.

routines.title: Loose Thread Sweep
input_boundaries: Codex-owned recent commits on main since the last loose-thread sweep receipt
Codex-owned Workboard rows touched since the last loose-thread sweep receipt
Deferred, TODO, FOLLOW-UP, punted, or do-later markers in docs/codex_tasks and task notes
Live Notion target queue/log reads for dedupe before any write

commands.command: python src/cloud_routine_commit.py --message "Loose-thread sweep scheduled run" --push --format text

routines.no_input_behavior: If no candidates qualify, write no Notion rows, append a success receipt saying nothing new, and leave unavailable target queues not checked rather than checked clear.

routines.title: Dossier Keeper
input_boundaries: Read-only repo stores (account_positions.json, source_calls.json, fundstrat_bible.json, top_prospects.json, open_opportunities.json, parabolic_setups.json, latest_cockpit_feed.json)
Live fundamentals via the data MCP (company info, analyst ratings, earnings, performances) for names on the worklist only
Web search for recent catalysts
No autonomous trades; no feed/dashboard regeneration; every drafted verdict is PENDING OPERATOR CONFIRMATION

commands.command: cd src && python -m dossier_universe --feed latest_cockpit_feed.json --format json
python src/cloud_routine_commit.py --message "Dossier keeper scheduled run" --push --format text

routines.no_input_behavior: If the worklist is empty, write nothing. If a name can't be grounded, draft an honest WATCH/PASS — never a fabricated BUY-CANDIDATE, size, or trigger. Every drafted/refreshed verdict is PENDING OPERATOR CONFIRMATION and is not a trade signal. Missing or unavailable evidence remains not checked/dark, never checked clear.

routines.title: Life OS Daily Briefing
input_boundaries: Notion REST data source reads using NOTION_TOKEN only
Life Tasks, Inbox, Drift Flags, Insights & Growth, and person-domain signals
Briefing & Review Log row write with live readback verification
Pushover link push using environment credentials only

commands.command: python src/cloud_routine_runner.py --run-source scheduled --routine-id life-os-daily-briefing --success-summary "life daily briefing succeeded" --failure-summary "life daily briefing failed" -- python src/life_work_os_briefing.py --routine life_daily --write-log --push --out src/life_os_daily_briefing_last_run.json --format text
python src/cloud_routine_commit.py --message "Life OS daily briefing scheduled run" --push --format text

routines.no_input_behavior: Missing Notion schema, credentials, or connector data stays not checked; do not emit checked-clear counts.

routines.title: Work OS Daily Briefing
input_boundaries: User-owned Notion only; never Solventum tenant data
Domain=Work Tasks, Work Operations, Evidence & Fact Ledger, Work Insights, and active Drift Flags
Employee vs claimant hat labels on every surfaced item
Briefing & Review Log row write with live readback verification

commands.command: python src/cloud_routine_runner.py --run-source scheduled --routine-id work-os-daily-briefing --success-summary "work daily briefing succeeded" --failure-summary "work daily briefing failed" -- python src/life_work_os_briefing.py --routine work_daily --write-log --push --out src/work_os_daily_briefing_last_run.json --format text
python src/cloud_routine_commit.py --message "Work OS daily briefing scheduled run" --push --format text

routines.no_input_behavior: Missing Notion schema, credentials, or connector data stays not checked; do not emit checked-clear counts.

routines.title: Life OS Weekly Review
input_boundaries: Notion REST data source reads using NOTION_TOKEN only
Slipped Life Tasks, recent Insights pattern candidates, hygiene backlog, and missing-daily-briefing checks
Synthesis candidates only; no automatic ratification
Briefing & Review Log row write with live readback verification

commands.command: python src/cloud_routine_runner.py --run-source scheduled --routine-id life-os-weekly-review --success-summary "life weekly review succeeded" --failure-summary "life weekly review failed" -- python src/life_work_os_briefing.py --routine life_weekly --write-log --push --out src/life_os_weekly_review_last_run.json --format text
python src/cloud_routine_commit.py --message "Life OS weekly review scheduled run" --push --format text

routines.no_input_behavior: Missing Notion schema, credentials, or connector data stays not checked; do not emit checked-clear counts.

routines.title: Work OS Weekly Review
input_boundaries: User-owned Notion only; never Solventum tenant data
Slipped Work items, evidence gaps, pattern candidates, candidate strategic moves, and emotional-load checks
Scout-only case content; no automatic case-file mutations
Briefing & Review Log row write with live readback verification

commands.command: python src/cloud_routine_runner.py --run-source scheduled --routine-id work-os-weekly-review --success-summary "work weekly review succeeded" --failure-summary "work weekly review failed" -- python src/life_work_os_briefing.py --routine work_weekly --write-log --push --out src/work_os_weekly_review_last_run.json --format text
python src/cloud_routine_commit.py --message "Work OS weekly review scheduled run" --push --format text

routines.no_input_behavior: Missing Notion schema, credentials, or connector data stays not checked; do not emit checked-clear counts.

routines.title: Life/Work OS Heartbeat Watch
input_boundaries: Briefing & Review Log rows for Life OS and Work OS Daily Briefings
Pushover alarm only when stale past the 36-hour threshold
Independent watcher; weekly reviews are not the outage detector

commands.command: python src/cloud_routine_runner.py --run-source scheduled --routine-id life-work-os-heartbeat-watch --success-summary "life/work heartbeat succeeded" --failure-summary "life/work heartbeat failed" -- python src/life_work_os_heartbeat.py --push --out src/life_work_os_heartbeat.json --format text
python src/cloud_routine_commit.py --message "Life/Work OS heartbeat scheduled run" --push --format text

routines.no_input_behavior: Missing Briefing & Review Log access stays not checked; do not report a current heartbeat from fallback or search counts.

routines.title: Life/Work OS Safe Hygiene
input_boundaries: Mechanical Tasks, Inbox, and After-Hours Queue hygiene only
Never delete; cancel/archive/status-update only
Never auto-mutate Work case-file content, Strategic Brief, Game Plan, Insights, or Evidence Ledger
System Changelog data source must be configured before applying mutations

commands.command: python src/cloud_routine_runner.py --run-source scheduled --routine-id life-work-os-safe-hygiene --success-summary "life/work safe hygiene succeeded" --failure-summary "life/work safe hygiene failed" -- python src/life_work_os_hygiene.py --apply --max-mutations 10 --out src/life_work_os_hygiene_receipt.json --format text
python src/cloud_routine_commit.py --message "Life/Work OS safe hygiene scheduled run" --push --format text

routines.no_input_behavior: Missing Notion schema, credentials, or System Changelog configuration stays not checked and prevents mutation apply.
